overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person perspective walking from a makeshift campfire camp through back alleys into a busy neon-lit city street at night. The player moves from a dark, fire-lit encampment past industrial buildings and onto a bustling road with futuristic vehicles and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift encampment with barrel fire and tents

agents.ego_description: walking past a burning barrel fire through a dark makeshift camp

entered.detail: metal barrel with bright orange flames providing the primary light source
canvas tent set up in the encampment area
large yellow and black garbage bags stacked on the ground
wooden barrel filled with chopped wood or debris
tall futuristic towers covered in holographic advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark makeshift camp at night, illuminated primarily by a burning barrel fire. Yellow garbage bags and canvas tents are scattered around a dirt ground, while massive neon-lit skyscrapers loom in the distant background.

events.description: leaves the campfire area and enters a narrow alley between buildings
fire light fades as artificial street lighting and neon becomes dominant

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alleyway toward the neon-lit city center

entered.detail: low concrete building with metal shutters and exterior lighting
tall palm tree silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the camp, the camera enters a narrow alley between industrial buildings. The warm firelight is replaced by cool artificial lighting from street lamps and distant neon signs. A palm tree and makeshift shelters line the path as the towering neon advertisements grow larger ahead.

events.description: exits the narrow alley onto a wide asphalt street
yellow sports car drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street as a yellow sports car speeds by

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving down the street with headlights on

entered.detail: asphalt street with lane markings and red curbs
futuristic yellow sports car with illuminated taillights
metal fence with barbed wire running along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up onto a wide city street with asphalt pavement. A bright yellow sports car speeds past as the camera crosses the road. Holographic billboards and chain-link fences line the street, while the massive neon towers dominate the skyline ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with parked vehicles and neon signage

events.description: large blue and white bus drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk as a large bus passes by on the left

notable_agents.action: large blue and white city bus driving along the street

entered.detail: large blue and white public transit bus with advertisements on the side
row of parked cars along the street curb
concrete pedestrian walkway with red painted curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk, the camera passes a large blue city bus and several parked vehicles. The street is lined with holographic billboards and industrial buildings, with scattered pedestrians visible in the distance. The neon towers remain prominent in the background as the journey continues down the urban street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, makeshift encampment into the vibrant, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic city. It begins in a dark camp illuminated by the glow of a burning barrel fire, surrounded by canvas tents and garbage bags while distant skyscrapers loom in the background. As the camera moves away from the fire, the scene shifts into a narrow industrial alley where warm light is replaced by cool artificial tones and the towering neon advertisements grow larger. The path then opens up onto a wide asphalt street, crossing the road as a bright yellow sports car speeds past beneath massive holographic billboards. Finally, the camera proceeds along a concrete sidewalk past a large blue city bus and parked vehicles, moving deeper into the urban landscape dominated by glowing towers and scattered pedestrians.
